mapper.select: SELECT prod_conts_id, admn_disp_nm, mdfr_id, mdf_dt FROM scms_prod_conts_l
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scms_prod_conts_l ( admn_disp_nm, regr_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{admnDispNm}, #{regrId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT prod_conts_id, admn_disp_nm, regr_id, reg_dt, mdfr_id, mdf_dt FROM scms_prod_conts_l WHERE prod_conts_id = #{prodContsId}
mapper.update: UPDATE scms_prod_conts_l SET admn_disp_nm = #{admnDispNm}, mdfr_id = #{mdfrId}, mdf_dt = NOW() WHERE prod_conts_id = #{prodContsId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO scms_prod_conts_lang_l ( prod_conts_id, lang_cd, prod_conts_titl, prod_conts_desc, dflt_lang_yn, regr_id, reg_dt ) VALUES
( #{prodContsId}, #{lang.langCd}, #{lang.prodContsTitl}, #{lang.prodContsDesc}, #{lang.dfltLangYn}, #{regrId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO scms_prod_conts_lang_l ( prod_conts_id, lang_cd, prod_conts_titl, prod_conts_desc, dflt_lang_yn, regr_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{prodContsId}, #{langCd}, #{prodContsTitl}, #{prodContsDesc}, #{dfltLangYn}, #{regrId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE scms_prod_conts_lang_l SET prod_conts_titl = #{prodContsTitl}, prod_conts_desc = #{prodContsDesc}, dflt_lang_yn = #{dfltLangYn}, mdfr_id = #{mdfrId}, mdf_dt = NOW() WHERE prod_conts_id = #{prodContsId} AND lang_cd = #{langCd}
